Abbreviations

AIartificial intelligence
MLmachine learning

1 INTRODUCTION

The introduction keeps the main narrative before the abbreviation glossary. This paragraph contains enough body prose for the browser workflow availability classifier to treat the scenario as full text rather than as an abstract-only page. It describes the motivating research question, the study design, and the evidence that the later table summarizes.

A second body paragraph keeps the numbered section above the minimum readable-content threshold and verifies that moving the glossary does not interrupt the article narrative.

TABLE 1. Scenario table.
ModelUse
AIDecision support
